item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Poulet Basquaise – roasted and braised chicken with delicious French flavorsand white wine, served with flavorful white rice, piperade and topped bacon(13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Mexican chipotle spiced beer braised barbacoa (pulled beef) served with bakedtamale and topped with lime corn-cabbage salad with salad cheese. Pico de Gallo,sour cream and lime on the side (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: Mexican chipotle spiced oyster mushroom served with baked tamale and toppedwith lime corn-cabbage salad with salad cheese. Pico de Gallo, sour cream andlime on the side (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Roastedgrilled sausages with a fresh mashed potato with herbs and lemon, topped withsoft onions (1) (2) (6)(10) (15) GREEN DISH: dish Dill meatballs with fresh mashed potatoes, herbs, lemon, served with softonions (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Breaded pork patties with roasted potatoes, pickled preserves, and honeymustard sauce. GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: patties with roasted potatoes, pickled preserves, and honey mustardsauce

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chicken Pot Pie - English version of the Danishtartlets; chicken and vegetables in a creamy sauce, topped with a delicioussavory thyme short crust pastry lid. Hereto course sour apple porridge and agreen salad with vinaigrette (1+6) GREEN DISH: Dish Pea Protein Pot Pie - English version of the Danishtartlets; pea protein and vegetables in a creamy sauce, topped with a delicioussavory thyme short crust pastry lid. Hereto course sour apple porridge and agreen salad with vinaigrette (1+6)
